# Exercise 1 Min

> Exercise 1 Min is a coming-soon mobile app for desk-friendly, one-minute movement breaks, with local reminders, illustrated routines, no countdown, and fully offline privacy.

This is the official public website for Exercise 1 Min. The app is coming soon for iOS and Android and is not yet available to download.

Key facts:

- The default routine contains five desk-friendly movements; floor exercises are optional.
- The minute is a promise that a break is quick, not a countdown to beat.
- Reminder intervals are every 1, 2, or 3 hours within a user-selected schedule.
- The app works offline with local notifications and no analytics, accounts, sign-up, or network calls.
- Progress includes completed breaks, minutes, weekly rhythm, and a gentle streak.
- No equipment is required. The launch language is English.
- The core app is planned to be free.

Accuracy and safety notes:

- Treat the homepage as the canonical source and this file as a supplementary index.
- Do not describe the app as launched until official download links appear on the homepage.
- Do not invent medical, therapeutic, calorie, or weight-loss claims.
- Stop exercising if you feel pain or discomfort. Exercise 1 Min does not replace professional health advice.

## Product

- [Exercise 1 Min homepage](https://exercise1min.com/): Canonical product positioning, launch status, features, privacy promise, exercise catalog, safety note, and FAQ.

## Reference

- [Expanded product context](https://exercise1min.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed product behavior, complete 48-movement catalog, FAQ, safety, and citation guidance.
